description: Lifecycle hooks for dotnet/runtime — AI disclosure guardrails

preToolUse.bash: d=; while IFS= read -r l; do d=$d$l; done; case $d in *'gh pr '*|*'gh issue '*) echo 'AI-GENERATED CONTENT DISCLOSURE: When posting to GitHub under a user account (not a bot/copilot app account), include a visible note (e.g. > [!NOTE]) indicating the content was AI/Copilot-generated. Skip only if the user explicitly asked to omit it.' >&2;; esac; :
preToolUse.powershell: $d = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($d -match 'gh\s+(pr|issue)\s') { [Console]::Error.WriteLine('AI-GENERATED CONTENT DISCLOSURE: When posting to GitHub under a user account (not a bot/copilot app account), include a visible note (e.g. > [!NOTE]) indicating the content was AI/Copilot-generated. Skip only if the user explicitly asked to omit it.') }
preToolUse.description: Remind to include AI-generated content disclosure when posting to GitHub via gh CLI
